Name: 1,000 MobaCoins Pack
Description: Secure high-priority virtual currency credits. Used for card recruitments, forge enhancements, and special events.

Name: 5,000 MobaCoins Bulk Pack
Description: Bulk allocation of virtual currency credits for major tactical squad advancements.

Name: Power Pack
Description: A tactical supply cell that fully restores both Attack Power (AP) and Defense Power (DP).

Name: Energy Pack
Description: An energy reserve pack that fully restores your active Energy (EN).

Name: Weekly Energy Reserve (Free)
Description: S.H.I.E.L.D. command backup energy cell. Free weekly emergency reserve.
